ddls:
CREATE TABLE "travelers" (
  "traveler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traveler */,
  "traveler_name" TEXT /* Full name of the traveler */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the traveler */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the traveler */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the traveler */,
  "traveler_type" TEXT /* Type of traveler (e.g., frequent, occasional) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the traveler */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the traveler */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the traveler */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the traveler's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the traveler's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traveler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home location */,
  "traveler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traveler */,
  "homename" TEXT /* Name of the home location */,
  "homecontinent" TEXT /* Continent of the home location */,
  "homecountry" TEXT /* Country of the home location */,
  "homelat" REAL /* Latitude of the home location */,
  "homelon" REAL /* Longitude of the home location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the home location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the home location */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the home location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the home location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the home location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_home_locations_traveler_id FOREIGN KEY ("traveler_id") REFERENCES travelers ("traveler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel location */,
  "traveler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traveler */,
  "travelcontinent" TEXT /* Continent of the travel location */,
  "travelcountry" TEXT /* Country of the travel location */,
  "travellat" REAL /* Latitude of the travel location */,
  "travellon" REAL /* Longitude of the travel location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the travel location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the travel location */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the travel location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the travel location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the travel location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_locations_traveler_id FOREIGN KEY ("traveler_id") REFERENCES travelers ("traveler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "traveler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traveler */,
  "home_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home location for the trip */,
  "travel_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel location for the trip */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trip */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trip */,
  "purpose_of_trip" TEXT /* Purpose of the trip (e.g., business, leisure) */,
  "travel_reason" TEXT /* More detailed information about the purpose of the trip */,
  "travel_mode" TEXT /* Mode of travel (e.g., flight, train, car) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trip record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trip record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_traveler_id FOREIGN KEY ("traveler_id") REFERENCES travelers ("traveler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_home_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_location_id") REFERENCES home_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_travel_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("travel_location_id") REFERENCES travel_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location of the activity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_activities_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "expense_type" TEXT /* Type of expense (e.g., lodging, meals, transportation) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the expense */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date of the expense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Name of the vendor or service provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the expense record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the expense record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_expenses_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel location */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., sunny, rainy, cloudy) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the weather data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the weather data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES travel_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "local_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel location */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the local event */,
  "event_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "event_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., cultural, sports, political) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_local_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES travel_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
